Name: FInputChord
Description: An Input Chord is a key and the modifier keys that are to be held with it.

Variables.Name: Key
Variables.Description: The Key is the core of the chord.

Variables.Name: bShift
Variables.Description: Whether the shift key is part of the chord.

Variables.Name: bCtrl
Variables.Description: Whether the control key is part of the chord.

Variables.Name: bAlt
Variables.Description: Whether the alt key is part of the chord.

Variables.Name: bCmd
Variables.Description: Whether the command key is part of the chord.
